message.content:
@startuml
participant "GuidedTourController" as GTC1
participant "GuidedTourController" as GTC2
participant "ServiceStudio.View" as SV1
participant "ServiceStudio.View" as SV2

GTC1 ..> SV1 : GetViewAdapter
GTC2 ..> SV2 : GetViewAdapter

GTC1 : GuidedTourController
GTC2 : GuidedTourController
SV1 : ServiceStudio.View
SV2 : ServiceStudio.View

@enduml
